description: Pre-optimized prompt→config cache for instant generation. When a user prompt closely matches a cached template, skip full LLM generation and use the cached config with variable substitution.

Best,
{{yourName}}

props.title: Mortgage Calculator
props.formula: ((principal - downPayment) * (rate / 100 / 12) * Math.pow(1 + rate / 100 / 12, years * 12)) / (Math.pow(1 + rate / 100 / 12, years * 12) - 1)

config.title: FAQ Page

sections.title: How does the free trial work?
sections.content: You get 14 days of full access, no credit card required. Cancel anytime.

sections.title: Can I change my plan later?
sections.content: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from account settings.

sections.title: What payment methods do you accept?
sections.content: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.

sections.title: Is there a refund policy?
sections.content: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.

sections.title: Do you offer team discounts?
sections.content: Yes! Teams of 5+ get 20% off. Contact sales@example.com for enterprise pricing.
